9. An interesting and probably a new feature to many
of our readers would be the rationale behind the state-
ment that tJre funeral rites of the native will be performed
by the son of the elder sister of the wife of the natives.
Now the Juneral rltes or Krlga l{orma as lt is called,
relates to the loth house oJ the Horoscope. Obviously,
therefore, this house should have an lntimate relation
with the son of the elder sister of the wife of the native.
